description: Retrieval regression baseline for the CI eval-gate. Dense E5 retrieval (run_eval.py) on the gold seed eval set over the published corpus, scored with byte-identical text-equivalence on by default (retrieving any passage identical to a gold chunk counts as a hit). Equivalence can only raise a metric versus raw-id scoring, so these guards stay conservative floors. A pull request fails when a guarded metric drops more than its tolerance below the baseline. Regenerate these numbers deliberately whenever an intended change (e.g. corpus expansion or an embedding swap) moves them: run scripts/run_eval.py on the gold set and update the baselines below.
